title: sida spinosa var. angustifolia
intro: Sida spinosa var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved sida, is a plant species in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sida spinosa var. angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Sida spinosa var. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
